name: binthere
description: A zero-knowledge, end-to-end encrypted pastebin. Content is encrypted/decrypted in the browser (AES-256-GCM); the server only ever stores ciphertext.

scripts.test: vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.dom.config.js && vitest run --config cli/vitest.config.js
scripts.kv:create: wrangler kv namespace create PASTES && wrangler kv namespace create PASTES --preview
